task: Deploy latest changes (sign ups today added to admin hero strip), rebuild FTS index on production after recent category fixes, audit search quality for top queries, and check for any other quick wins

assignments.devops: Run smoke test (python3 smoke_test.py), then deploy latest changes to Fly.io using `~/.fly/bin/flyctl deploy --local-only`. Verify 200 after deploy and send Telegram notification.
assignments.backend: After deploy completes, SSH into production and rebuild the FTS index: run `INSERT INTO tools_fts(tools_fts) VALUES('rebuild')` and `PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE)` to pick up recent category fixes. Confirm no errors.
assignments.mcp: After FTS rebuild, audit search quality for top queries by hitting the production /api/tools/search endpoint for: auth, payments, database, email, monitoring, analytics, orm, testing. For each: check top result relevance, presence of install_command, correct category. Flag any misfires or thin results. Also scan for any other quick wins in search ranking or response quality.

decomposition.reasoning: Strict sequential dependency: deploy must land first (so category fixes are live), then FTS index rebuild on production to make those fixes searchable, then search quality audit to validate the new index returns clean results. No parallelism possible here — each step gates the next.

strategy_review.reasoning: Error: Input must be provided either through stdin or as a prompt argument when using --print
